overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night in a video game. The scene is extremely dark with minimal visibility, following a narrow dirt path surrounded by pine trees and undergrowth. A brief glimpse of a red vehicle light appears at the start before disappearing into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail at night

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path through the dark forest, navigating between pine trees with limited visibility

entered.detail: red glowing light source visible briefly at the left edge, likely a vehicle tail light before entering the woods
tall pine tree trunks lining both sides of the forest path, barely visible in the darkness
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with visible ground texture and patches of grass
thick bushes and low vegetation surrounding the trail on both sides

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a pitch-black pine forest at night, following a narrow dirt trail. A red vehicle light is briefly visible on the left at the very beginning before being left behind as the camera proceeds deeper into the woods. Tall pine trees and dense undergrowth flank the path, creating an enclosed and ominous atmosphere typical of survival horror game environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a pitch-black pine forest that deepens into an increasingly enclosed and ominous wilderness. It begins by passing a brief glimpse of a red vehicle light on the left, which quickly vanishes as the camera proceeds forward. As the light fades, the view focuses on a narrow dirt trail cutting through the darkness. The scene then tightens as the camera moves deeper into the woods, flanked by towering pine trees and dense undergrowth that wall in the path.
